## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or checks above passed locally.
- [ ] Documentation was updated for user-visible behavior changes.
- [ ] No secrets, `.env` files, DuckDB files, dbt targets, `site/`, NetCDF downloads, or generated geography are committed.
- [ ] Public jobs, schedules, marts, geography, or configuration changes are called out.
- [ ] Fixtures are generated synthetic files; source-derived mappings have provenance and reuse terms.
- [ ] Every commit has a DCO 1.1 `Signed-off-by` line.
